<?php namespace MailerSend\Helpers\Builder; use MailerSend\Contracts\Arrayable; class Forward implements Arrayable, \JsonSerializable { protected string $type; protected string $value; public function __construct(string $type, string $value) { $this->type = $type; $this->value = $value; } public function toArray(): array { return [ 'type' => $this->type, 'value' => $this->value, ]; } #[\ReturnTypeWillChange] public function jsonSerialize() { return $this->toArray(); } }
